name: Fudge # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a shallow dish and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, salt, and milk. Cook over low heat until the mixture reaches a full rolling boil.
3. Continue cooking until it reaches 234 degrees F on a candy thermometer (soft ball stage).
4. Remove from heat and gradually add melted butter. Let cool to about 130 degrees.
5. Stir in vanilla until the mixture begins to thicken.
6. Quickly fold in chopped walnuts and candied cherries (if using). Pour the mixture into the buttered dish.
7. Allow it to set; the fudge is ready to eat almost immediately. Cut into squares and serve.
